[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" background_color="#88c4dd" dipl_enable_particle_background="on" dipl_particle_number="60" dipl_enable_linked_line="off" dipl_particle_movement_speed="2" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_timeline select_timeline_layout_option="dipl_timeline_left" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_timeline_header_text_color="#000000" global_timeline_text_text_color="#000000" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_timeline_item timeline_title="Consultation & Needs Assessment" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" background_color="#FFFFFF" background_enable_color="on" global_colors_info="{}"]

We begin by understanding your needs, preferences, and budget.

[/dipl_timeline_item][dipl_timeline_item timeline_title="Property Search & Selection" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" background_color="#FFFFFF" background_enable_color="on" global_colors_info="{}"]

Based on your criteria, we’ll present a curated list of properties.

[/dipl_timeline_item][dipl_timeline_item timeline_title="Negotiation & Offer" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" background_color="#FFFFFF" background_enable_color="on" global_colors_info="{}"]

Once you've found your ideal property, we handle the negotiation process.

[/dipl_timeline_item][dipl_timeline_item timeline_title="Closing & Beyond" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" background_color="#FFFFFF" background_enable_color="on" global_colors_info="{}"]

From finalizing paperwork to handing over the keys, we'll guide you every step.

[/dipl_timeline_item][/dipl_timeline][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://diviplus.io/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/architecture-house-building-home-construction-facade.webp?_t=1732163845" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
